title: Sundiata: The Sorcerer's Defeat
description: Sundiata confronts Soumaoro the sorcerer-king, who is invulnerable to weapons — and defeats him with a rooster's spur tipped with the spirit of his ancestors.
introduction: Sundiata confronts Soumaoro the sorcerer-king, who is invulnerable to weapons — and defeats him with a rooster's spur tipped with the spirit of his ancestors.

translation.text: Sundiata drew the arrow tipped with the rooster's spur. Soumaoro screamed and fled, his power broken.
